nodes.label: zhuzhuzihan (Telegram Bot main developer, server provider)
get-manager.yml (download KSU Manager APK + SUSFS module)
KernelSU (kernel-based root solution for Android GKI)
ReSukiSU (KernelSU variant, primary for this project)
SukiSU (KernelSU variant, slower updates than ReSukiSU)
SUSFS v2.1.0 (target version, potential upgrade gap)
ZRAM LZ4 v1.10.0 with ARM64 NEON acceleration
ZeroMount VFS (VFS-based path redirection, missing in GKI_KernelSU_SUSFS)
Enhanced SUSFS 51_ patch (kstat redirect, unicode filter, AS_FLAGS guards)
TCP BBR congestion control (missing feature gap)
Unicode bypass fix (blocks invisible/confusable Unicode path attacks)
AOSP repo tool v2.16 (kernel manifest sync)
Bazel/Kleaf (GKI kernel build system for 6.x kernels)
update_data.py (JSON data generator for GitHub Pages)
apply_lz4_neon.sh (injects ARM64 NEON calls into crypto/fs modules)
Commit c17aae5 (removed multi-KSU variant support, ReSukiSU-only)
PHASE 1: Environment Bootstrap (repo, deps, ccache, toolchain, signing)
PHASE 2: Kernel Source Acquisition (GCC, repo init, deprecated branch detection)
PHASE 4: Sublevel Extraction (reads actual SUBLEVEL from Makefile)
PHASE 5: glibc 2.38 Compatibility Fix (BTF + C99 fixes for old kernels)
PHASE 7: KernelSU Integration (clone ReSukiSU via setup.sh)
PHASE 8: SUSFS Patch (copy, pre-context, apply, restore, post-fix, ~280 lines)
PHASE 9: Droidspaces + NTSync (optional container + Wine/Proton sync)
PHASE 10: ZRAM LZ4 Stack (LZ4 1.10.0 upgrade, LZ4KD, LZ4K_OPLUS)
PHASE 11: WiFi/BT Compatibility (Samsung KDP, Xiaomi symbols for 6.6)
PHASE 12: ZRAM Config (CONFIG_ZRAM=y, module→built-in, fragment append)
PHASE 13: BBG Baseband Guard (optional, wget setup.sh | bash)
PHASE 14: Re-Kernel (optional GKI Vendor Hook protection)
PHASE 15: Kernel Options & Config (KSU, KPM, KALLSYMS, defconfig unwrap)
PHASE 17: Kernel Name Configuration (KMI_TAG mapping, localversion, dirty removal)
PHASE 19: Compilation (5.x build.sh vs 6.x Bazel fork, LTO=thin/none)
PHASE 20: Artifact Collection & Packaging (Image.gz, AnyKernel3 ZIP)
PHASE 21: Diagnostic Collection (.rej files from failed patch hunks)
Gaokao 2026 Archive (repo frozen during Chinese college entrance exam)
Multi-manager mode (ReSukiSU driver, KowSU/SukiSU-Ultra managers supported)
Gap: TCP BBR missing (no CONFIG_TCP_CONG_BBR, CONFIG_DEFAULT_BBR)
Gap: ZeroMount VFS missing (60_ patch, exists only in Super-Builders)
Gap: SUSFS v2.1.0 version uncertain (may need upstream tag verification)
Gap: Enhanced SUSFS 51_ patch absent (only in Super-Builders)
glibc 2.38 compatibility fix (resolve_btfids + C99 for old kernels on Ubuntu 24.04)
Deprecated branch auto-detection (GitHub Actions patches manifest for old AOSP branches)
Bazel defconfig fragment trick (config additions via --defconfig_fragment for 6.x)
LTO thin vs none (thin for 5.10-6.6, none for 6.12 with Rust modules)

edges.label: USES (repo init + repo sync for kernel source)
DEPICTS (SUSFS branch selection in build UI)
DEPICTS (SUSFS commit selection in build UI)
